# Larger rectangle at 90° — exercises stall density on a bigger footprint.

polygon outer
(0,0)
(300,0)
(300,200)
(0,200)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (0,0)-(300,200), area 60000

set stall-angle=90
----

generate
----
total_stalls: 92
faces: 11 (boundary: 1, interior: 10)
graph: 18 vertices, 27 edges (perimeter: 14, interior: 13)
regions: 1
